global.description: The ad features a prominent logo, engaging text, and various graphic elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to binge-watch with a flexible cancellation policy.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'BingeLayer' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.
